description: Complex composition bucket intentionally combines multiple compositional constraints. Each prompt has one count, two attribute bindings, and one spatial relation. This is the only intentionally mixed-skill bucket.

templates.template: Are there exactly {count_word} {object_plural} in the image?

reward_rule.note: Use only target_questions for reward computation.

non_overlap_note: Pure buckets remain target-isolated; this bucket intentionally combines skills.
